sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3338" key="a)kontodo/kos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκοντο-δόκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n3338.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">receiving</tr_> (i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hit by) the dart</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0261.tlg001:106" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">106</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
